note: Escalation copy is clinical content (CLAUDE.md §9). base_message is drawn from product plan §4.8 verbatim; the urgent block covers the additional 'calm resource block with local emergency guidance' required for self_injury_risk/safety_risk. 'local resource finder' text is a placeholder until a real resource-finder feature exists.
base_message: Some of what you've shared suggests your child may benefit from being seen soon by a doctor. This doesn't mean something is seriously wrong — it means a professional should take a closer look.
urgent_resource_heading: If you need support right now
urgent_resource_message: If you're worried about your child's immediate safety, please contact a doctor, local emergency services, or a crisis helpline today. You are not alone, and reaching out is the right step.
